    How it worksDemoPricingBlogsAboutContactTerms & ConditionsSecurity/Privacy

    Copyright & Intellectual Property Policy

    How theRec.site respects intellectual property rights and handles copyright complaints.

    1. Your responsibility for uploaded content

    Users may only upload content they own or have legal rights to use, including recordings, files, and other materials shared through theRec.site.

    Uploading copyrighted content without authorization from the rights holder is strictly prohibited. You remain fully responsible for the legality of all content you upload, publish, or distribute through the platform.

    2. Respect for intellectual property

    theRec.site respects intellectual property rights and expects users to do the same. We respond to valid copyright complaints submitted in good faith with sufficient information to identify the reported material.

    3. Copyright infringement notices

    If the platform receives a legitimate copyright infringement notice, the reported content may be disabled, restricted, or permanently removed without prior notice.

    To report alleged infringement, contact us through our Contact page with details identifying the content, your relationship to the rights holder, and a good-faith statement of unauthorized use.

    4. Repeat offenders

    Users who repeatedly upload or share infringing content may have their accounts suspended or permanently terminated, in addition to removal of the reported material.

    5. No monitoring obligation

    theRec.site is not obligated to proactively monitor all user uploads, but reserves the right to review, investigate, and take action on content that may violate copyright law or this policy.

    © 2026 theRec. All rights reserved.
